subcodes.title: Words to a newspaper editor, spoken on 1912-10-20
subcodes.first_line: I will tell you one thing and it will suffice once and for all. Beyond this neither question me nor will I reply. And that is the words of Christ when told that 'your brothers have come to see you.'
subcodes.first_line_orig: یک کلمه بتو می گویم و این تا آخر کافی است و بیش از ین نه تو سئوال کن و نه من جواب میدهم و آن کلمه بیان حضرت مسیح است
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @hospitality, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @stories; anecdotes
